Package neqsim.process.processmodel

Interface ProcessModel.ModelProgressListener

Enclosing class:
ProcessModel
public static interface ProcessModel.ModelProgressListener
Interface for monitoring ProcessModel execution progress. Implementations receive callbacks at the model level: before/after each process area runs, before/after each outer iteration, and when the model starts/completes.

Designed for integration with:

  • Jupyter notebooks for monitoring multi-area convergence
  • Digital twin dashboards for plant-wide status
  • Debugging tools for inter-process convergence analysis
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBeforeIteration(int iterationNumber)
    Called at the start of each outer iteration, before any areas are run.
    default void
    onBeforeProcessArea(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, int areaIndex, int totalAreas, int iterationNumber)
    Called before a process area is executed.
    default void
    onIterationComplete(int iterationNumber, boolean converged, double maxError)
    Called when an outer iteration of the model completes.
    default void
    onModelComplete(int totalIterations, boolean converged)
    Called once when the model finishes execution.
    default void
    onModelStart(int totalAreas)
    Called once when the model begins execution.
    void
    onProcessAreaComplete(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, int areaIndex, int totalAreas, int iterationNumber)
    Called after a process area completes a single execution pass.
    default boolean
    onProcessAreaError(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, Exception exception)
    Called if a process area encounters an error during execution.

  • Method Details

    • onProcessAreaComplete

      void onProcessAreaComplete(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, int areaIndex, int totalAreas, int iterationNumber)
      Called after a process area completes a single execution pass.
      Parameters:
      areaName - the name of the process area
      process - the ProcessSystem that completed
      areaIndex - zero-based index of the area in execution order
      totalAreas - total number of process areas
      iterationNumber - current outer iteration number (starts at 1)

    • onBeforeProcessArea

      default void onBeforeProcessArea(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, int areaIndex, int totalAreas, int iterationNumber)
      Called before a process area is executed.
      Parameters:
      areaName - the name of the process area about to run
      process - the ProcessSystem about to run
      areaIndex - zero-based index of the area
      totalAreas - total number of process areas
      iterationNumber - current outer iteration number (starts at 1)

    • onIterationComplete

      default void onIterationComplete(int iterationNumber, boolean converged, double maxError)
      Called when an outer iteration of the model completes.
      Parameters:
      iterationNumber - the iteration that just completed (starts at 1)
      converged - true if the model has converged
      maxError - maximum relative error across all variables

    • onBeforeIteration

      default void onBeforeIteration(int iterationNumber)
      Called at the start of each outer iteration, before any areas are run.
      Parameters:
      iterationNumber - the iteration about to start (starts at 1)

    • onModelStart

      default void onModelStart(int totalAreas)
      Called once when the model begins execution.
      Parameters:
      totalAreas - total number of process areas

    • onModelComplete

      default void onModelComplete(int totalIterations, boolean converged)
      Called once when the model finishes execution.
      Parameters:
      totalIterations - total number of iterations performed
      converged - true if the model converged

    • onProcessAreaError

      default boolean onProcessAreaError(String areaName, ProcessSystem process, Exception exception)
      Called if a process area encounters an error during execution.
      Parameters:
      areaName - name of the area that failed
      process - the ProcessSystem that failed
      exception - the exception that was thrown
      Returns:
      true to continue with next area, false to abort
